# Summer Fête

Join us on the village green for our annual **summer fête**. Expect stalls,
music, and questionable homemade cake.

## Schedule

| Time  | Event            |
| ----- | ---------------- |
| 10:00 | Gates open       |
| 12:30 | Dog show         |
| 15:00 | Prize draw       |

Read the [full programme](/events/summer-fete/programme/) or email
info@example.org.

- Free entry
- Dogs welcome
- ~~No~~ Plenty of parking
